children.text: Baku cuisine, one of the oldest culinary traditions, is renowned for its rich flavors and unique combinations. Our menu showcases the best of this heritage, featuring succulent lamb dishes, fresh seafood, and an array of aromatic herbs and spices that will transport your taste buds to the shores of the Caspian Sea.
